HERO.TITLE: Accelerating growth for high-potential companies
HERO.DESCRIPTION: OSEOR SA is an innovative and dynamic holding company with multiple stakes, committed to the sustainable growth of its subsidiaries. Through transparent governance, reliable performance indicators, and centralized support functions, the group ensures effective management of its activities.

POURQUOI.TITLE: Why choose OSEOR?
POURQUOI.ITEM1_DESC: Each company benefits from unique support, adapted to its specific needs and growth ambitions.
POURQUOI.ITEM2_DESC: Our teams bring together sharp skills in finance, strategy, and technical assistance for a 360° vision.
POURQUOI.ITEM3_DESC: Access a solid ecosystem of strategic and financial partners to accelerate your sustainable development.

PROJETS.TITLE: Supported Projects
PROJETS.DESCRIPTION: Discover some projects we have supported in their structuring and financing.

SECTEURS.TITLE: Areas of Intervention
SECTEURS.DESCRIPTION: We operate in key sectors of the economy with expertise adapted to each environment.

ENERGY_PAGE.TITLE: Energy Sector
ENERGY_PAGE.DESC: OSEOR supports major energy players to ensure a sustainable transition and regional energy sovereignty.

INDUSTRY_PAGE.TITLE: Industry Sector
INDUSTRY_PAGE.DESC: Industry at the heart of our strategy to build a strong, resilient, and forward-looking economy.

SERVICES_PAGE.TITLE: Services Sector
SERVICES_PAGE.DESC: Innovative and strategic services to propel companies toward operational excellence and growth.

BANDEAU.TEXT: OSEOR is a holding company specialized in investment and financial engineering. We support high-potential SMEs and start-ups in structuring, financing, and developing their activities.

CTA.TITLE: Are you a high-potential company?
CTA.DESC: Let's talk about your project and build your future success together.

PARTICIPATIONS.TITLE: Our Participations
PARTICIPATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Through its equity participation, OSEOR supports the growth of high-potential companies and contributes to building high-performing and sustainable groups.

ABOUT_PAGE.TITLE: A strategic vision for growth
ABOUT_PAGE.P1: Founded in 2015, OSEOR supports the development of corporate groups through equity participation in high-potential companies.
ABOUT_PAGE.P2: Today, the company has 15 partner companies, illustrating the strength of its positioning and the extent of its commitment.
ABOUT_PAGE.P3: Became a Public Limited Company (SA) in 2020–2021, OSEOR has strengthened its credibility and capacity for action. Its headquarters are located in Lomé, Agoènyivé, BKS 1, D&D building.
ABOUT_PAGE.GOV_P1: A board of directors, chaired by Mr. DAOU AKLESSO Yérima, defines the major strategic orientations.
ABOUT_PAGE.GOV_P2: The general management is ensured by Mr. Pascal PAMASSI, who pilots the development and performance of the company.
